name: Charlotte Douglas International
notes: Fourth parallel runway planned (~2027); 2014 capacity may understate future airfield throughput.

name: Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International

name: Memphis International
notes: Major FedEx cargo superhub; now a Small passenger hub but retains an FAA capacity profile (kept Tier 1).

name: Chicago O'Hare International
notes: New runway 9C/27C opened Nov 2020 plus reconfiguration; airfield capacity higher than 2014 profile.

name: John Wayne-Orange County
aliases: Santa Ana|John Wayne|Orange County|John Wayne Airport
notes: Commercial ops/passengers capped by a community Settlement Agreement (amended 2003); practical commercial capacity below runway capacity.
